audit_items.proof_trace: The only write to `s_auctionStarts[asset]` (L353) is guarded by `else` in the branch `if (asset == s_assetOut)`, so `s_auctionStarts[s_assetOut]` is always 0. `bid()` checks `auctionStart == 0` at L425 and reverts with `InvalidAuction`, making bidding on `s_assetOut` impossible. `_setAssetOut` also requires no live auctions before changing `s_assetOut`, preventing any race where the assetOut is swapped to an already-auctioned asset.
